title: blechnum palmiforme
intro: Blechnum palmiforme, also known as the Australian chain fern or chain fern, is a type of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Blechnum palmiforme include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
